entity.label: Naarah
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: Girl, a town on the boundary between Ephraim and Benjamin (Josh. 16:7), not far probably from Jericho, to the north (1 Chr. 7:28).

nodes.label: Naarah
nodes.description: Girl, a town on the boundary between Ephraim and Benjamin (Josh. 16:7), not far probably from Jericho, to the north (1 Chr. 7:28).

verses.text: And it went down from Janohah to Ataroth, and to Naarath, and came to Jericho, and went out at Jordan.
